chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.D-6300 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1.For order on Misc.No.33977/16 (urgent) 2.For orders on Misc.No.33978/16 (amendment) 3.For hearing of Main Case 29.12.2016 Petitioner is present alongwith her counsel Mr.Javed Akhtar, advocate Mr.Muhammad Rafiq Rajorvi, AAG Mr.Ghulam Shabbir Baloch, Standing Counsel Nooruddin, Law Officer, Pakistan Rangers is also present Mehdi Hassan, PDSP, CTD, (Sindh) Karachi is also present Addl.SHO SIP Muhammad Zubair PS New Town is also present......... SHO PS New Town, respondent No.6, has filed comments through Additional SHO, in which it is stated that alleged detenue Muhammad Yousuf is confined in Central Prison, Karachi, in Crime No.275/16 lodged under section 6/9-C CNS Act of PS Tipu Sultan. He has also attached Certificate duly signed by Senior Superintendent, Central Prison, Karachi. On this report, question of missing person is over as alleged detenue is confined in Central Prison, Karachi, in some crime though learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he has been falsely implicated in the case, for which, the petitioner has to avail appropriate remedy in the trial court. Petition is disposed of accordingly alongwith listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ashraf
